description: Return product flow - add mandatory bill number field, printable return receipt, stock decrement on return completion, and bill number search in admin returns list.
steps: Add a 'billNumber' field to the ReturnRequest model in prisma/schema.prisma. Type: String, required (no ? nullable). Add an index on billNumber for search. Run npx prisma generate after schema change. Also create a migration SQL file at prisma/migrations/<timestamp>_add_bill_number_to_return/migration.sql with the ALTER TABLE statement.

Update the returnRequestSchema in lib/validations.ts to add billNumber as a required z.string() field that matches an order number pattern. Add server-side validation in app/api/orders/[id]/returns/route.ts: before creating the ReturnRequest, verify that billNumber matches an existing order's orderNumber in the database. If no matching order is found, return a 400 error with code 'INVALID_BILL_NUMBER'.

Update the customer-facing return request UI in components/dashboard/customer-orders-client.tsx (the ReturnRequestSheet function): add a 'Bill Number / Order Invoice Number' input field that is required. Pre-fill it with the current order's orderNumber (since the customer is already on that order). Include it in the POST body to /api/orders/[id]/returns.

Update the admin returns list (app/admin/returns/page.tsx and components/admin/admin-returns-client.tsx): include billNumber in the data fetched and displayed. Add billNumber to the search filter so staff can search by bill number. Display billNumber prominently in each return card.

Add stock increment on return completion: In app/api/admin/returns/[id]/route.ts, when a return transitions to REFUNDED status, after processing the refund, increment the stock for each returned product. Parse the items JSON from the return request, and for each item with a productId (from the original OrderItem), increment Product.stock by the returned quantity. Use prisma product.update with stock: { increment: quantity }.

Create a printable return receipt component: Create components/admin/return-receipt-print.tsx - a client component that renders a print-friendly receipt with: return number, bill number (original order number), date, items returned (name, quantity, price), total refund amount, refund method. Add a 'Print Receipt' button in the admin returns client that opens a print dialog (window.print() targeting the receipt). Use CSS @media print to hide non-receipt content.

Update the GET endpoint for admin returns (if one exists at app/api/admin/returns/route.ts) to include billNumber in the response. If no GET endpoint exists, the page.tsx server component already fetches directly - update the prisma query there to include billNumber in select.
acceptance_criteria: ReturnRequest model has a billNumber String field
Customer cannot submit a return without a valid bill number that matches an existing order
Admin returns list shows billNumber and allows searching by it
When a return is marked REFUNDED, product stock is incremented for each returned item
A printable return receipt is available with return details
findings: All acceptance criteria met. billNumber added to ReturnRequest model, validation enforced client and server side, stock incremented on refund, print receipt available for REFUNDED returns. prisma generate + tsc + lint all pass.
